diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 import esm

 

 class AAVPredictor(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, esm_model_name="esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=2):

+    def __init__(self, esm_model_name="esm2_t30_150M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=1):

         super().__init__()

         if esm_model_name == "esm2_t6_8M_UR50D":

             self.esm, self.alphabet = esm.pretrained.esm2_t6_8M_UR50D()

@@ -26,16 +26,20 @@
                 param.requires_grad = True

                 

         self.conv = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=embed_dim, out_channels=512, kernel_size=7, padding=3),

+            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=embed_dim, out_channels=256, kernel_size=7, padding=3),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.2),

-            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=512, out_channels=512, kernel_size=7, padding=3),

+            nn.Conv1d(in_channels=256, out_channels=256, kernel_size=7, padding=3),

             nn.ReLU(),

             nn.Dropout(0.2)

         )

         

-        self.head_dropout = nn.Dropout(0.2)

-        self.regressor = nn.Linear(512, 1)

+        self.regressor = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(256, 128),

+            nn.ReLU(),

+            nn.Dropout(0.3),

+            nn.Linear(128, 1)

+        )

         

     def forward(self, tokens):

         results = self.esm(tokens, repr_layers=[self.esm.num_layers], return_contacts=False)

@@ -47,7 +51,7 @@
         # token_representations: (batch, seq_len, embed_dim)

         x = token_representations.transpose(1, 2) # (batch, embed_dim, seq_len)

         x = self.conv(x)

-        x = x.transpose(1, 2) # (batch, seq_len, 512)

+        x = x.transpose(1, 2) # (batch, seq_len, 256)

         

         # Mean pooling

         sum_embeddings = torch.sum(x * mask.unsqueeze(-1), dim=1)

@@ -55,5 +59,4 @@
         lengths = torch.clamp(lengths, min=1e-9)

         mean_embeddings = sum_embeddings / lengths

         

-        mean_embeddings = self.head_dropout(mean_embeddings)

         return self.regressor(mean_embeddings).squeeze(-1)

--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@
     

     device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

     

-    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=2)

+    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t30_150M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=1)

     model.load_state_dict(torch.load(args.checkpoint, map_location="cpu"))

     model.to(device)

     model.eval()

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@
     

     device = torch.device("cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu")

     

-    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t12_35M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=2)

+    model = AAVPredictor("esm2_t30_150M_UR50D", unfreeze_layers=1)

     model.to(device)

     

     train_dataset = AAVDataset(train_csv, model.alphabet)

@@ -66,11 +66,11 @@
     regressor_params = [p for p in model.regressor.parameters() if p.requires_grad]

     

     optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW([

-        {'params': esm_params, 'lr': 1e-4, 'weight_decay': 0.02},

+        {'params': esm_params, 'lr': 5e-5, 'weight_decay': 0.02},

         {'params': conv_params + regressor_params, 'lr': 1e-3, 'weight_decay': 0.02}

     ])

     

-    epochs = 8

+    epochs = 6

     scheduler = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(

         optimizer,

         T_max=epochs * len(train_loader)
